revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従九位]][[ko:종9위]][[zh:從九位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従九位]][[ko:종9위]][[zh:從九位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従九位]][[ko:종9위]][[zh:從九位]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:従九位]][[ko:종9위]][[zh:從九位]]
'''Jūkyū-i''' (従九位) is one of the {{ill|Court Ranks in Japan|ja|位階|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Court Ranks of Japan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It is positioned below {{ill|Senior Ninth Rank|ja|正九位|1=Senior Ninth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|qq=}} and above {{ill|Senior Initial Rank|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} in the hierarchy.<ref>https://www.wakapoetry.net/background/society/court-offices-titles-and-Ranks/court-Ranks/</ref>
== Overview ==
Jūkyū-i was established in the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}} under the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|qid=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}}. It was defined by the {{ill|Shokuinryō|ja|職員令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shokuinryō|qq=}} issued in {{ill|July 1869|ja|1869th year 7月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 1869|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and amended on {{ill|August 22, 1869|ja|1869th year 8月22日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 22, 1869|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref group="notes">The Cabinet Records Bureau's "Independent Book: Meiji Official Ranks History, Section on Offices" (National Archives of Japan ref.A07090183000) states it was established on {{ill|July 8 (Lunisolar)|ja|Lunisolar July8日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 8 (Lunisolar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and revised on {{ill|August 20 (Lunisolar)|ja|Lunisolar August20日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 20 (Lunisolar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.</ref><ref>[{{NDLDC|787949/168}} 法令全書「明治2nd year 」], National Diet Library.</ref> It corresponded to positions such as provincial officials within the {{ill|Ministry of Popular Affairs (Meiji period)|ja|民部省 (明治時代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ministry of Popular Affairs (Meiji period)|qq=}} and the {{ill|Ōkura-shō|ja|大蔵省|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura-shō|1=Ministry of the Treasury|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q910073}}.
Since no positions were assigned to the lower Ranks of {{ill|Daishoi|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} or {{ill|Shōshoi|ja|少初位|1=Junior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Initial Rank|qq=}} when the Shokuinryō was enacted, these Ranks became "empty Ranks" (虚位). As a result, Jūkyū-i effectively became the lowest Rank in practice.<ref>Toriumi, Yasushi. "Rankings (Part 2)," in {{ill|National History Encyclopedia|ja|国史大辞典|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National History Encyclopedia|qq=}} Vol. 1, Yoshikawa Kōbunkan, 1979, p. 430.</ref>
In the honor system established by the {{ill|Joi Jōrei|ja|叙位条例|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Joi Jōrei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Imperial Edict No. 10 of 1887) and the {{ill|Ikai-ryō|ja|位階令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikai-ryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 位階|1=Court Ranks in Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q99196082}} (Imperial Edict No. 325 of 1926), no Rank corresponding to 九位 (Kyū-i) was included.
== Notes ==
=== Notes === {{Reflist|group="notes"}}
=== References === {{Reflist}}
== External links ==
[https://laws.e-gov.go.jp/document?lawid=215IO0000000325 位階令] - {{ill|e-Gov Law Search|ja|e-Gov法令検索|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/e-Gov Law Search|qq=}} [{{NDLDC|787949/168}} 官位相当表] - National Diet Library Digital Archive

Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank|ja|従六位|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Seventh Rank|ja|正七位|1=Senior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Seventh Rank|ja|従七位|1=Junior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Seventh Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Eighth Rank|ja|正八位|1=Senior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Eighth Rank|ja|従八位|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Ninth Rank|ja|正九位|1=Senior Ninth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Ninth Rank|ja|従九位|1=Junior Ninth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Ninth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Ninth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Initial Rank|ja|大初位|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Initial Rank|ja|少初位|1=Junior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Initial Ranks of Japan]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
